name: What are big mistakes to avoid after work injury in Draper?

mainEntity.name: What are big mistakes to avoid after work injury in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report fast, cooperate, stick to authorized care.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Don't delay reporting, refuse light duty/exams, switch doctors without approval, or ignore treatment.[1][2] These lead to denials.[2] Key factors: no social media posts contradicting injury; cooperate fully. Document everything.[1] Get legal help early.

description: Report fast, cooperate, stick to authorized care.[1][2]
